radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here, command. Report current situation at scene. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Two vehicles fully involved heavy smoke near the building. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here, command. Confirm civilian presence near the fire. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Two civilians located at safe distance being monitored. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here, command. Begin fire suppression on nearest burning vehicle. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Affirmative advancing hose line toward closest vehicle. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Request thermal imagery to assess heat spread to nearby vehicles. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine one here, command thermal data incoming. Confirm extension, risk to building, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine one, received heat detected near facade. Possible interior risk, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine one here, command check building for possible occupants inside, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine one, no visible entry yet. Possible occupants inside unconfirmed, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine one, water application ongoing, flames reducing on first vehicle, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine one here, command, proceed to second vehicle after knockdown, listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine one, signal weak. Experiencing intermittent communication drops. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here. Command received weak signal. Maintain updates when connection stabilizes. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Command here. Engine 1 understood. Continuing suppression and monitoring surrounding vehicles. Finished.
